creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
I should also mention that there are changes in other libtiff packages/
ports that you may wish to consider for FreeBSD. Gentoo has a modification
that supports tiffs with jbig2 compression (present in some newer versions
of libtiff), and Debian has backported the tiff2pdf present in tiff 4.0 to
correct some bugs in the version found in 3.8.x. (I see that at least one
person has encountered problems with tiff2pdf and has filed a PR.)

Regards,
          b.
